violations.description: PERSON IN CHARGE (4 pts): The Manager during the course of the inspection did not possess a Certified Manager's Certificate within the appropriate time.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): No sanitizer used was being used in three compartment sink.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interiors need cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Shelving inside reachin coolers noted not in good repair rusting.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter and in bucket with no sanitizer.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Reachin coolers noted with no thermometer.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. ( lids are up ). Pile of rubbish noted near dumpsters to be removed.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling areas in kitchen and storage area noted in need of cleaning and some repair work. Missing ceiling vent covers in corner of kitchen and also some ceiling tiles are missing; need installation.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelving in kitchen noted in need of cleaning.

COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Food products removed at this time placed out of operation.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. To be changed out routinely.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in restrooms not working. Covered waste recetacles needed in ladies restroom stalls.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor wall and ceiling areas need cleaning and repairs.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair rusting.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. ( lids are up )
PREMISES (1 pts): Articles not necessary for the operation of the food service facility were noted stored on outside premises.
LIGHTING (1 pts): Inadequate lighting was noted in the ware-washing area. One light fixture not working.
